heroHeadline: Ukraine Strikes Tuapse Refinery Twice in One Week; Russia Threatens European Defense Contractors
heroSubtitle: Ukraine's sustained drone campaign against Russian oil infrastructure has disabled an estimated 40% of Russia's export capacity since March. Russia responded by publishing European defense contractor addresses as alleged targets — an unprecedented coercive threat. Diplomatic tensions deepened after Trump envoys visited Moscow before Kyiv, drawing Zelensky's condemnation as 'disrespectful.'
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
